pro_brother.song_name: I Want To Know What Love Is

content:
Tabbed by: Fred Savard
Email: fredo_71@hotmail.com

Song: I Want To Know What Love Is (Jones)
Group: Foreigner
Album: Agent Provocateur
Year: 1985


[Intro]

| [ch]Em[/ch] ' ' [ch]D[/ch] | [ch]G[/ch] ' ' ' | [ch]C[/ch] ' | [ch]Em[/ch] ' ' ' | [ch]Em[/ch] ' ' ' |


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
   I've gotta take a little time, a little time to think things over.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
   I better read between the lines, in case I need it when I'm older.[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
   Now, this mountain I must climb feels like the world upon my shoulders.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
   Through the clouds I see love shine.  It keeps me warm as life grows colder.[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]      [ch]Am7[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
In my life there's been heartache and pain.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
I don't know if I can face it again.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]C/D[/ch]
   Can't stop now.  I've travelled so far to change this lonely life.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]   *1* [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]    *1*
  I wanna know what love is.         I want you to show me.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]   *1* [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D7[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]   *2*
  I wanna feel what love is.         I know you can show me.[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]
   I'm gonna take a little time, a little time to look around me.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
   I've got nowhere left to hide.  It looks like love has finally found me.[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]      [ch]Am7[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
In my life there's been heartache and pain.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
I don't know if I could face it again.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]C/D[/ch]
   Can't stop now.  I've travelled so far to change this lonely life.[/tab]


[Chorus] (x5)

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]   *1* [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]    *1*
  I wanna know what love is.         I want you to show me.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]   *1* [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
  I wanna feel what love is.         I know you can show me.[/tab]
